current_authority_statements.boundary: Mission is the operator-facing loop and owns durable mission state.
current_authority_statements.constraint: Completion metrics must come from Mission reconciliation, not child Atlas readbacks alone.

current_authority_statements.boundary: Blueprint remains the requirements and authorization authority.
current_authority_statements.constraint: Ready bounded Atlas work can continue without Blueprint, but new authorization must route through Blueprint.

current_authority_statements.boundary: Atlas owns workgraph state, context packs, and continuation prompts.
current_authority_statements.constraint: Atlas readbacks must not claim execution, promotion, or policy authority.

current_authority_statements.boundary: Covenant owns policy, schema, ticket, and trust semantics.
current_authority_statements.constraint: Other components consume Covenant decisions and cannot redefine policy acceptance.

current_authority_statements.boundary: AO2 owns runtime execution and approval application.
current_authority_statements.constraint: This Month 5 preparation wave stops before provider execution or mutation application.

current_authority_statements.boundary: Control plane owns observer storage, indexing, migrations, and evidence service state.
current_authority_statements.constraint: Atlas may bind evidence but must not deploy or widen credentials.

current_authority_statements.boundary: Promoter owns promotion and no-promotion decisions.
current_authority_statements.constraint: The Month 5 wave requests no promotion and preserves current authority denial.

current_authority_statements.boundary: Unrestricted RSI remains outside the live authority boundary.
current_authority_statements.constraint: Bounded RSI continuity evidence is preserved, but no broad RSI claim is made.

outdated_documentation_signals: Architecture readiness inventory must include Mission and Blueprint when describing the active stack.
Architecture authority statements must distinguish current behavior from historical proof-ladder campaign evidence.
Current source-truth readbacks must preserve the no-promotion and RSI-denied state while Month 5 preparation proceeds.
